runtimeContract.reducedMotionRule: When reduced motion is active, CharacterStage removes animation and transform. Every sprite must remain readable as a still pose.
runtimeContract.mobileRule: Pose must read in a 170x290 frame and at roughly 42vw on small screens without relying on tiny facial detail.

states.staticPoseRead: warm threshold-keeper at rest, grounded hands, soft shoulders, slight belly visible
states.promptRule: Neutral center of mass. No pre-lean, no bow, no large hand gesture.
states.reducedMotionStill: Still image must communicate calm availability.
rejectIf: pose reads as executive authority instead of concierge welcome
belly or human age cues are polished away
feet baseline differs from other poses

states.staticPoseRead: ready state should reuse idle without looking inactive
states.promptRule: Idle pose needs enough eye contact and hand readiness to cover ready and returning states.
states.reducedMotionStill: Still image must feel awake, not paused or asleep.
rejectIf: hands are hidden
eyes are too downcast for a ready state

states.staticPoseRead: Otis receives the user again without surprise
states.promptRule: Keep expression warmly recognizing rather than neutral-service blank.
states.reducedMotionStill: Still image should read as a familiar return point.
rejectIf: generic hotel smile replaces quiet knowing warmth
silhouette loses the burgundy torso read

states.runtimeMotion: 0.9s nod, up to 1px down and -0.7deg rotation
states.staticPoseRead: polite welcome, small hand opening, chin only slightly inclined
states.promptRule: Generate the start/end of a nod, not the deepest bow frame.
states.reducedMotionStill: Still image must already read as greeting through hand and face.
rejectIf: deep bow plus runtime nod makes him submissive
arm sweep would crop or wobble in CharacterStage
face becomes too cheerful or mascot-like

states.staticPoseRead: attentive, receptive, slightly forward and side-open
states.promptRule: Keep lean modest and leave extra side padding around shoulders, elbows, hands, and props.
states.reducedMotionStill: Still image must read as listening without transform motion.
rejectIf: lean is so strong he looks anxious or hunched
prop or elbow approaches frame edge
head angle hides the warm face at mobile size

states.staticPoseRead: careful pause, weighing the right words
states.promptRule: Use a restrained ledger/keycard/chin-adjacent gesture without covering face or belly.
states.reducedMotionStill: Still image must show a thoughtful pause.
rejectIf: gesture covers mouth or eyes
thinking reads as confusion
prop text appears

states.staticPoseRead: warm concise explanation, small open mouth, restrained hand cue
states.promptRule: One speaking expression only. No mouth-frame sheet, no exaggerated lip sync.
states.reducedMotionStill: Still image must read as speaking even without pulse.
rejectIf: open mouth becomes cartoonish
hand gesture is too wide for the frame
runtime pulse makes the face feel rubbery

states.staticPoseRead: talking pose must also cover briefing delivery
states.promptRule: Talking pose should feel like orientation, not casual chatter.
states.reducedMotionStill: Still image must support a briefing card or streaming text beside him.
rejectIf: pose is too jokey for first-session guidance
expression conflicts with serious briefing content

states.runtimeMotion: 0.9s emphasis bump, up to 1px right and -1px up
states.staticPoseRead: calm threshold block, firmer eyes, small wait gesture
states.promptRule: Alert through face and hand, not through a lunge. He is protective, not alarmed.
states.reducedMotionStill: Still image must make alert priority clear.
rejectIf: he turns into security guard energy
pose copies war-room kinetic pressure
raised hand is cropped or too large

states.staticPoseRead: quietly handling ledger, bell, or keycard ring
states.promptRule: Keep prop close to torso and avoid readable fake text.
states.reducedMotionStill: Still image must read as useful work, not idle duplication.
rejectIf: ledger hides torso or belly
fake text appears
prop extends beyond safe padding

posePackRule: All seven poses across regular, summer-light, and winter-layered must preserve face shape, body proportions, feet baseline, shoulder width, belly read, prop scale, and app-frame centering. Motion personality comes from Otis being steady under tiny CharacterStage transforms, not from large illustrated action.
